blocks.text: Bodo/Glimt storm San Siro with a 3-1 lead — Norway's night of nights
A 3-1 first-leg lead. Now the Arctic underdogs travel to the Meazza — they need only hold out to reach a Champions League quarterfinal. Norwegian football has never stood this tall in Europe.
🎮 13:00 — rain (Håvard Nygaard) in action as 100 Thieves face MANA in DraculaN Season 5
